entry.title: New: RES25-213 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT TO THE CITY OF ONE HIGH-BACKED TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS, AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ, "DONATED BY THE FAMILY AND FRIENDS OF CHER NALANI SULLIVAN," VALUED AT $3,669.51 FROM ELINA GRUGIER-BELL TO BE PLACED AT SANDY BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
